full_text:
Gong Du 龔都
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Du (龔都). Joined Liu Bei. Former Yellow Scarve. Killed by Xiahou Yuan at Ru Nan. Gong Du was affiliated with Yellow Scarves and the Shu Kingdom. Gong Du lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
